display.purpose: Hero headlines and page-defining titles. Poppins 800, text-balance.

arabic.purpose: Verses and shalawat. Amiri, gold, rtl, line-height 2 — voice, not ornament.

label.purpose: Hero greeting pill only. Never a per-section eyebrow.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Hover state, paired with gentle upward translate.

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: Emerald-tinted soft glow under primary buttons.

motion.name: ease-gentle
motion.purpose: Ease-out for hover lifts and reveals — calm, no bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The brand's main action. Emerald pill with gentle hover lift.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: #166534; color: #fff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(22,101,52,0.20); text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #15803d; box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #166534; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Gold Button
components.description: Highest-intent invitation only. Sacred gold fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: #b8902a; color: #fff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; padding: 0.875rem 1.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); text-decoration: none; transition: filter 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-gold:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-gold:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #b8902a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Emerald outline that fills on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: #166534; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border: 1px solid rgba(22,101,52,0.30); border-radius: 9999px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #166534; color: #fff; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #166534; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Article/schedule/channel card. Flat at rest, gentle lift on hover.
components.html:
Kajian Kitab Kuning

Pembahasan fiqih dasar bersama santri dan jamaah.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d6e7cc; border-radius: 1.35rem; padding: 2rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: box-shadow 0.3s, transform 0.3s, border-color 0.3s; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: rgba(22,101,52,0.30); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.125rem; color: #11271b; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.65; color: #54675b; margin: 0.5rem 0 0; }

components.name: Star Divider
components.description: Signature divider — gold gradient hairlines flanking an 8-point star. Frames sacred/invitational moments.
components.css: .ds-divider { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 1rem; } .ds-divider-line { height: 1px; width: 7rem; } .ds-divider-line-l { background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, rgba(184,144,42,0.6)); } .ds-divider-line-r { background: linear-gradient(to left, transparent, rgba(184,144,42,0.6)); } .ds-star { width: 1.5rem; height: 1.5rem; flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview: The site should feel like stepping into a calm hall of learning — air, light, and reverence. Emerald greens ground it like the cloth and tilework of a prayer space; gold marks what is sacred or invitational, never what is merely for sale. Arabic script (Amiri) is not decoration but voice. The density is low and the pacing unhurried — a place of stillness, hospitality, and trust earned through tradition, not slickness. This system rejects the generic SaaS/template look, ornate clutter, cold corporate sterility, and loud marketing hype. Dignity over hype, always.
keyCharacteristics: Emerald + gold on cream paper (deep forest in dark mode) — the logo palette, never re-picked.
Reverent treatment of Arabic script: gold weight, generous line-height, honored placement.
Soft pill geometry, gentle elevation, calm hover lift — refined and never aggressive.
Low ornament density: geometric star motifs as structural accent only.
Legibility first — comfortable for an elder jamaah on a phone in daylight.

rules.name: The Gold-is-Sacred Rule
rules.body: Gold marks the sacred (Arabic script, divine names) and the single highest-intent invitation. Never a generic accent. If gold appears more than ~3 times on a fold, one is wrong.

rules.name: The One-Hue Rule
rules.body: The palette is emerald, its tonal washes, and gold. No second chromatic family. Warmth comes from cream paper and gold, not added orange/teal/blue.

rules.name: The Honored-Script Rule
rules.body: Arabic is never shrunk, cramped, or used as background texture. Gold weight, line-height ≥2, deliberate placement. Voice, not ornament.

rules.name: The Reserved-Kicker Rule
rules.body: The uppercase tracked label is for the hero greeting and rare named labels only. Forbidden as a repeating per-section eyebrow.

rules.name: The Gentle-Lift Rule
rules.body: Elevation appears on hover as a small upward translate plus a softer, larger shadow. Rest is calm. Nothing permanently floats.

dos: Do keep emerald + gold + cream as the entire palette; carry warmth through paper and gold, not a second hue.
Do honor Arabic script: gold, line-height ≥2, dir=rtl lang=ar, deliberate placement.
Do use the gold/star divider and ornaments to frame sacred and invitational moments — at low opacity, structurally.
Do keep body text at ≥4.5:1 contrast (lean toward Forest Ink #11271b; verify Muted Ink #54675b before reading use).
Do use soft pill buttons with gentle hover lift; keep focus outlines visible.
Do cap prose at 65–75ch and give sections generous vertical air.
donts: Don't ship the generic SaaS/template look — no repeated icon-card grids, no gradient text, no per-section uppercase eyebrow.
Don't clutter with ornate filigree or busy Islamic clip-art; one ornament too many means remove it.
Don't go cold/corporate — no fintech-navy, no sterile impersonal stock blandness.
Don't be loud or flashy — no CTAs shouting on every fold, no hype tone. Dignity over hype.
Don't use border-left/border-right >1px as a colored stripe on cards or alerts.
Don't treat gold as a generic accent — it marks the sacred and the single highest invitation only.
Don't nest cards, or let headline copy overflow its container at any breakpoint.
